blocks.content: In this activity you will analyse and fix code to help out a co-worker.

Background
blocks.content: A co-worker is trying to fetch quote number 53 from dummyjson but is receiving an unexpected output. They are unsure of what the problem is and have asked for your help.

blocks.title: Instructions
blocks.content: Analyse and fix the code below so that it outputs the 53rd quote.
